label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked with BERNAL 60km out, dropped him on final climb for dominant solo win and virtual GC takeover after EIKING crashed.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL attacked 60km from finish, only ROGLIC willing to follow from favorites group, revealing GC rivals' defensive mindset.
Bahrain Victorious chased despite LANDA in break, suggesting they rated breakaway threat higher than GC rider freedom.
SEPP-KUSS sprinted for second to deny bonus seconds to ROGLIC's rivals, showing team depth converts to time gains.
ROGLIC waited until final climb to drop BERNAL after collaborative work, exploiting domestique-turned-ally after gap established.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: initiated decisive 60km move and descended aggressively despite crash scare, showing restored climbing aggression post-Giro recovery
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: only GC contender willing to follow BERNAL's long-range move, then soloed final climb with crushing margin
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: crashed on wet descent and lost 9+ minutes, revealing fragility under persistent Category 1 climbing load
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: sprinted for podium but never attempted to bridge to BERNAL-ROGLIC despite teammate LANDA in earlier break
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: sat in chase group when BERNAL went, missed critical selection that cost 2+ minutes to ROGLIC
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: finished in top group despite no team support visible, showing individual resilience on sustained climbs
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: animated early breakaway on Cat 1 climbs before fade, suggesting form returning for future leadership
